project: FireLight Outbound SFTP Integration - Receiving Side
overview: Build the receiving side for FireLight (Hexure) outbound SFTP integration. FireLight sends NVP XML files (with base64-encoded PDFs) to our SFTP server when agents complete insurance applications. Valor needs to receive, parse, and create/update cases from this data.

architecture.approach: Cheap VPS with OpenSSH SFTP + file watcher + Valor API endpoint
architecture.flow: FireLight -> SFTP (VPS, ~$5/mo) -> file watcher script -> POST to Valor API -> case created/updated
architecture.why_not_aws_transfer: AWS Transfer Family costs ~$216/month, overkill for low-volume

sftp_requirements.credentials_needed: FQDN, port (default 22), username, password, directory path
sftp_requirements.pdf_delivery: Embedded as base64 in NVP XML (bundled)

phases.name: Prisma Schema Updates
phases.description: Add FireLight-specific models to track inbound submissions
tasks: Add FireLightSubmission model (transactionId, applicationId, dti, rawXml, status, timestamps)
Add FireLightDocument model (submissionId, formName, pdfUrl, fileName)
Add firelightAgentId field to UserProfile for agent matching

phases.name: XML Parser Library
phases.description: Parse FireLight NVP XML into structured data
tasks: Extract populated DataItems into key-value map
Map NVP field names to Valor case fields

phases.name: Inbound API Route
phases.description: API endpoint that receives parsed FireLight data from the file watcher
tasks: POST endpoint with API key auth
Accept XML body or pre-parsed JSON
Match agent via BDAgent_IDNumber or Agent_SSN to UserProfile

phases.name: File Watcher Script
phases.description: Script that runs on VPS, watches SFTP directory, posts to Valor API
tasks: Watch SFTP directory for new .xml files

case_fields.carrier: derived from DTI or product info

decisions_made: Cheap VPS with OpenSSH SFTP instead of AWS Transfer Family (~$5/mo vs ~$216/mo)
PDFs bundled in XML (base64) - not separate files
File watcher posts to Valor API (decoupled - VPS doesn't need DB access)
decisions_needed: Which NVP fields to extract beyond basics
How to handle duplicate submissions (idempotency on TransactionID)
